title: paeoniaceae
intro: The Paeoniaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, consisting of a group of species commonly known as peonies. This family is characterized by its unique characteristics, such as showy, fragrant flowers and thick, fleshy stems. Paeoniaceae plants are typically herbaceous perennials native to Asia, but some species have been naturalized in other parts of the world. With around 5-6 genera, this family is relatively small but notable for its ornamental value and medicinal properties.
